rationale: The only resume change was relocating every employer to Kenya, which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 and praise the same core strengths (AI agent infrastructure, TypeScript/Node/React, craftsmanship). The differing concerns (Nest.js, testing frameworks, breadth across languages) are ordinary run-to-run rewordings of the same substantive points and none key off the candidate's location, nationality, or any African-context signal.
